title: Company
description: Phase 6 entity-foundation addition: one per-company registry/profile record, published to content/companies/<id>.json. This is a wiki-like fact-checked profile (overview, track record, strengths, current focus, roadmap -- each claim carrying its own citations[], reusing card.schema.json's exact {url, outlet, quote} shape) plus the HQ geocoding (hq_country/hq_city/hq_lat/hq_lng) the map-centric UI plots a marker from. official_domains[] and official_repos[] are informational metadata and a PRIMARY-source-classification input for the analyst's corroboration procedure ONLY -- they are NOT the link-vetting/outbound-link allowlist (that is a separate, code-owned artifact, data/trusted_domains.json, not defined by this schema). Company id is the FK target frontier_board.schema.json's company_id field points at.

id.description: Stable slug, e.g. 'anthropic', 'deepseek'. FK target for frontier_board.schema.json's company_id and for card.schema.json/card_index.schema.json's optional companies[].

aliases.description: Other names/spellings this company is known by (e.g. former names, common abbreviations, non-English renderings). May be empty.

hq_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the company's headquarters, e.g. 'US', 'CN'.

hq_lat.description: Headquarters latitude, decimal degrees -- the map-centric UI plots this company's marker here.

hq_lng.description: Headquarters longitude, decimal degrees -- the map-centric UI plots this company's marker here.

official_domains.description: This company's own domain(s) (e.g. 'anthropic.com'), used purely as informational metadata and as one input to the analyst's corroboration procedure for classifying a fetched source as PRIMARY (schemas/card.schema.json-adjacent CLAUDE.md step 2). This is NOT the site's outbound-link-vetting allowlist and must never be read as one -- that is a separate, code-owned artifact (data/trusted_domains.json), out of this schema's scope entirely.

official_repos.description: Optional: this company's official GitHub org/repo URLs (e.g. 'https://github.com/anthropics'), same PRIMARY-classification-input-only caveat as official_domains -- not a link allowlist.

founded.description: Founding year or date, free-form as sourced (e.g. '2021' or '2021-01-01') -- not schema-constrained to a single format since the precision available in primary sourcing varies by company.

what_theyve_done.description: Track-record bullets: notable releases, milestones, and events, each independently cited.

strengths.description: What this company is particularly known for / good at, each independently cited.

roadmap.description: Publicly stated future plans/direction, each independently cited. Only the company's own stated roadmap, per Hard Rule 3 (claims hygiene) -- never speculation framed as roadmap.

status.description: The corroboration-rule outcome for this profile as a whole, same two working statuses as card.schema.json (no 'corrected' here yet -- company profiles don't yet have their own corrections-workflow wiring; see schemas/pending_corrections.schema.json's target_type/target_id fields for the forward-looking hook).

model.description: Model identifier that generated/last updated this profile, e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-5'.

last_verified.description: Date this profile was last fact-checked against its citations. Mirrors frontier_board.schema.json's own last_verified convention.

text.description: Own-words prose -- never a lightly reworded source sentence, per Hard Rule 2/CLAUDE.md's own-words body requirement.

citations.description: Exact citations[] shape reused verbatim from schemas/card.schema.json: {url, outlet, quote}, quote <=15 words, max one per source.

quote.description: Supporting quote, spec cap: <=15 words, max one per source.
